calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Monica R. Wiley, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Katy Bersamin, #11722.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Unifund CCR Partners, a partnership doing business in California.
No appearance by defendant Chung K. Wong, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on August 19, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 19, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on June 28, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Unifund CCR Partners, a partnership doing business in California, and against the Defaulted Defendant chung K. Wong, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $33,471.52.
Prejudgment Interest - $11,711.99.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - $409.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $45,592.51.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
